name: semantica
description: Semantica 🧠 • Build AI systems that can explain, trace, and justify every decision. Knowledge graphs, context graphs, reasoning engines, provenance, and governance for production AI.
summaryZh: Semantica 🧠 • Build AI systems that can explain, trace, and justify every decision. Knowledge graphs, context graphs, reasoning engines, provenance, and governance for production AI. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
